SEARCH
Package dev.deepcore.challenge.inventory

Class InventoryMechanicsCoordinatorService

java.lang.Object
dev.deepcore.challenge.inventory.InventoryMechanicsCoordinatorService
public final class InventoryMechanicsCoordinatorService extends Object
Coordinates inventory-mechanics event behavior for degrading/shared inventory flows.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    InventoryMechanicsCoordinatorService(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, ChallengeManager challengeManager, DegradingInventoryService degradingInventoryService, SharedInventorySyncService sharedInventorySyncService, Predicate<org.bukkit.entity.Player> isChallengeActive, Supplier<Boolean> isSharedInventoryEnabled, Supplier<List<org.bukkit.entity.Player>> onlineParticipantsSupplier, Consumer<org.bukkit.entity.Player> enforceInventorySlotCap, DeepCoreLogger log)
    Creates an inventory mechanics coordinator service.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    handleBlockMultiPlace(org.bukkit.event.block.BlockMultiPlaceEvent event)
    Handles multi block placements for slot-cap and shared-sync updates.
    void
    handleBlockPlace(org.bukkit.event.block.BlockPlaceEvent event)
    Handles single block placements for slot-cap and shared-sync updates.
    void
    handleCraftItem(org.bukkit.event.inventory.CraftItemEvent event)
    Handles crafting interactions that may change synchronized inventories.
    void
    handleEnderEyeUse(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerInteractEvent event)
    Handles ender-eye use so consumption is mirrored to other participants.
    void
    handleEntityPickupItem(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityPickupItemEvent event)
    Handles item pickups and broadcasts shared pickup cues to participants.
    void
    handleEntityResurrect(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityResurrectEvent event)
    Handles totem pops so consumption is mirrored to other participants.
    void
    handleInventoryClick(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryClickEvent event)
    Handles inventory click updates for cap and shared-sync behavior.
    void
    handleInventoryCreative(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryCreativeEvent event)
    Handles creative inventory interactions for cap and shared-sync behavior.
    void
    handleInventoryDrag(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryDragEvent event)
    Handles drag interactions including locked-slot barrier protection rules.
    void
    handleLodestoneBreak(org.bukkit.event.block.BlockBreakEvent event)
    Handles lodestone breaks that can desync compass state.
    void
    handlePlayerArmorChanged(com.destroystokyo.paper.event.player.PlayerArmorChangeEvent event)
    Handles post-change equipment updates to deterministically mirror right-click hotbar armor equipping.
    void
    handlePlayerBucketEmpty(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerBucketEmptyEvent event)
    Handles bucket-empty events for cap enforcement and inventory sync.
    void
    handlePlayerBucketEntity(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerBucketEntityEvent event)
    Handles fish pickup and similar bucket-entity interactions.
    void
    handlePlayerBucketFill(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerBucketFillEvent event)
    Handles bucket-fill events for cap enforcement and inventory sync.
    void
    handlePlayerDropItem(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerDropItemEvent event)
    Handles item drops and blocks dropping protected barrier items.
    void
    handlePlayerEditBook(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerEditBookEvent event)
    Handles player-signed book updates that rewrite held book content.
    void
    handlePlayerItemConsume(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerItemConsumeEvent event)
    Handles consumable use updates that affect shared inventory state.
    void
    handlePlayerItemDamage(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerItemDamageEvent event)
    Handles durability damage updates for shared inventory propagation.
    void
    handlePlayerItemHeld(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerItemHeldEvent event)
    Handles held-slot changes for cap enforcement and synchronization.
    void
    handlePlayerPickupArrow(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerPickupArrowEvent event)
    Handles arrow pickups and defers a shared-inventory synchronization tick.
    void
    handlePlayerSwapHandItems(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerSwapHandItemsEvent event)
    Handles swapping hands and protects locked barrier slots from movement.
    void
    handlePlayerTakeLecternBook(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerTakeLecternBookEvent event)
    Handles lectern book removal that mutates player inventory.
    void
    handlePotentialWearableUse(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerInteractEvent event)
    Handles right-click wearable equip attempts for shared inventory mode.
    void
    handleProjectileLaunch(org.bukkit.event.entity.ProjectileLaunchEvent event)
    Handles projectile launches that consume synchronized projectile items.
    void
    handleSpecialInventoryMutatingEntityInteract(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerInteractEntityEvent event)
    Handles special right-click entity interactions that can consume items.
    void
    handleSpecialInventoryMutatingInteract(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerInteractEvent event)
    Handles special right-click block/item interactions known to mutate inventory in hard-to-capture ways.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • InventoryMechanicsCoordinatorService

      public InventoryMechanicsCoordinatorService(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, ChallengeManager challengeManager, DegradingInventoryService degradingInventoryService, SharedInventorySyncService sharedInventorySyncService, Predicate<org.bukkit.entity.Player> isChallengeActive, Supplier<Boolean> isSharedInventoryEnabled, Supplier<List<org.bukkit.entity.Player>> onlineParticipantsSupplier, Consumer<org.bukkit.entity.Player> enforceInventorySlotCap, DeepCoreLogger log)
      Creates an inventory mechanics coordinator service.
      Parameters:
      plugin - plugin instance used for scheduled sync tasks
      challengeManager - challenge component state manager
      degradingInventoryService - degrading inventory behavior service
      sharedInventorySyncService - shared inventory synchronization service
      isChallengeActive - predicate that checks whether a player is in active challenge scope
      isSharedInventoryEnabled - supplier that reports whether shared inventory is enabled
      onlineParticipantsSupplier - supplier for currently online challenge participants
      enforceInventorySlotCap - action that enforces current degrading slot cap for a player
      log - logger used for inventory-related diagnostics

  • Method Details

    • handleInventoryClick

      public void handleInventoryClick(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryClickEvent event)
      Handles inventory click updates for cap and shared-sync behavior.
      Parameters:
      event - inventory click event to process

      event - creative inventory click event to process
